title: stringify_type returns None for typing.Optional types instead of "Optional[X]"
body:
stringify_type() in radicli/util.py returns None when given Optional[str] or Optional[int] instead of the string "Optional[str]".



This causes deserialize_type() to fall back to str converter for Optional-typed arguments, losing type information.
Fix: handle Optional (Union[X, None]) in stringify_type() and return the appropriate string.
Add a test in radicli/tests/test_util.py.
